# reposerver-full

Repo-server cmd-params: bools, timeouts, size quantities, OCI, TLS, client CA, tar exclusions

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/reposerver-full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  reposerver.listen.address: "0.0.0.0"
  reposerver.metrics.listen.address: "127.0.0.1"
  reposerver.log.format: json
  reposerver.log.level: debug
  reposerver.parallelism.limit: "4"
  reposerver.disable.tls: "false"
  reposerver.enable.git.submodule: "true"
  reposerver.allow.oob.symlinks: "false"
  reposerver.include.hidden.directories: "true"
  reposerver.enable.builtin.git.config: "true"
  reposerver.git.request.timeout: 15s
  reposerver.git.lsremote.parallelism.limit: "8"
  reposerver.default.cache.expiration: 24h
  reposerver.repo.cache.expiration: 12h
  reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size: 10M
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.tar.size: 100M
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.extracted.size: 1G
  reposerver.plugin.use.manifest.generate.paths: "true"
  reposerver.profile.enabled: "true"
  reposerver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  reposerver.client.ca.path: /app/config/tls/ca.crt
  reposerver.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  reposerver.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  reposerver.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
  reposerver.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size: 1G
  reposerver.disable.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size: "false"
  reposerver.oci.layer.media.types: application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar,application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip
  reposerver.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size: 1G
  reposerver.disable.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size: "false"
  reposerver.helm.user.agent: ArgoCD-RepoServer
  reposerver.grpc.max.size: "100"
  reposerver.revision.cache.lock.timeout: 10s
  reposerver.plugin.tar.exclusions: "*.git;*.svn;node_modules"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer:
    allowOOBSymlinks: false
    cache:
      defaultExpiration: 24h0m0s
      repoExpiration: 12h0m0s
    clientCAPath: /app/config/tls/ca.crt
    git:
      builtinConfigEnabled: true
      lsRemoteParallelismLimit: 8
      requestTimeout: 15s
      submoduleEnabled: true
    grpcMaxSize: 100Mi
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    helm:
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 1G
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
      userAgent: ArgoCD-RepoServer
    includeHiddenDirectories: true
    listen:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      metricsAddress: 127.0.0.1
    log:
      format: json
      level: debug
    maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize: 10M
    oci:
      layerMediaTypes:
      - application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar
      - application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 1G
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
    parallelismLimit: 4
    plugin:
      tarExclusionGlobs:
      - '*.git'
      - '*.svn'
      - node_modules
      useManifestGeneratePaths: true
    profileEnabled: true
    revisionCacheLockTimeout: 10s
    streamedManifest:
      maxExtractedSize: 1G
      maxTarSize: 100M
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
  server: {}
```

data:
  reposerver.allow.oob.symlinks: "false"
  reposerver.client.ca.path: /app/config/tls/ca.crt

  reposerver.metrics.listen.address: 127.0.0.1

  reposerver.plugin.use.manifest.generate.paths: "true"
  reposerver.profile.enabled: "true"
  reposerver.repo.cache.expiration: 12h0m0s
  reposerver.revision.cache.lock.timeout: 10s

kind: ConfigMap
